allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''Total artists: {len\(d\)}''''\)" curl -s "http://localhost:3000/api/artists/hosanna-ministries")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''Artist: {d[""name""]}, songs: {len\(d[""songs""]\)}, albums: {len\(d[""albums""]\)}''''\)")
